rationale: Subject home is under active construction. The orange bounding box spans approximately 253 × 272 pixels (53.6 ft × 57.7 ft = 3,093 sq ft bounding area). The visible roof consists of two interconnected hip-roof sections — a smaller upper/front section (~25×22 ft) and a larger main section (~48×35 ft) — connected at a valley junction. No gable ends are present (pure hip geometry, rake = 0). A fill factor of ~0.80 was applied to the bounding rectangle to account for the hip roof shape and areas where decking/framing is exposed but not yet fully covered. Final footprint: ~2,450 sq ft. Confidence is low (0.40) because active construction makes it difficult to distinguish finished roof plane from unfinished deck, and portions of the structure may not yet have roofing materials in place.
